Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Court call:
Jeremiah Armstrong, Esq., 415-296-7070, appearing for Keleher and Leung, Plaintiff
Jonathan Varnica, Esq., 415-398-0200, appearing for Mark Krinsky, Defendant
David Jordan, Esq., 415-986-5900, appearing for Mark Krinsky, Defendant

ARGUED. Mr. Armstrong contested the tentative ruling.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARK KRINSKY Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Continued To Nov-06-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MARK KRINSKY Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to November 6, 2020. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of all papers in support of an in opposition to the motion to department 501 no later than October 23, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Continued To Oct-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARK KRINSKY Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to October 16,2020. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Defendant Mark Krinsky Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
